jsonLd.title: FabAlley is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
